name: Shimoda
description: She is a former student of Rena Nakano (the Nakano Quintuplets' mother) during her 2nd year of senior high school and she is currently a cram school lecturer. She is first seen encountering Itsuki Nakano while visiting the Nakano Family Grave. ~!Shimoda exchange contact address with Itsuki and promise to keep in touch. Later, Itsuki is seen working part-time job with Shimoda. !~
